interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 description Link to ISP
 nameif outside
 security-level 0
 ip address 203.0.113.2 255.255.255.0
 ip verify reverse-path
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 nameif inside
 security-level 100
 ip address 10.10.20.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface Management0/0
 nameif mgmt
 security-level 100
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
!
banner login UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS TO THIS DEVICE IS PROHIBITED.
banner login You must have explicit permission to access or configure this device.
banner login All activity is logged and monitored.
banner motd Authorized use only.
object network inside-net
 subnet 10.10.20.0 255.255.255.0
object-group network mgmt-admins
 network-object host 192.168.1.50
 network-object host 192.168.1.51
object-group service web-services
 service-object tcp destination eq https
access-list outside_in remark permit inbound https to web
access-list outside_in extended permit tcp any host 203.0.113.10 eq https
access-list outside_in extended deny ip any any log
access-list inside_in extended permit tcp object inside-net any object-group web-services
access-list inside_in extended deny ip any any log
access-group outside_in in interface outside
access-group inside_in in interface inside

aaa-server TACACS (inside) host 10.10.20.41

aaa authentication http console TACACS LOCAL

aaa accounting command TACACS

logging host mgmt 192.168.1.70

 integrity sha384

 prf sha384
 lifetime seconds 86400
crypto map outside_map 10 match address outside_in

crypto map outside_map 10 set ikev2 ipsec-proposal SECURE-PROP
crypto map outside_map 10 set pfs group20
crypto map outside_map interface outside
crypto ikev2 enable outside

ssl cipher tlsv1.2 high
webvpn
 enable outside

group-policy ra-vpn attributes

 split-tunnel-policy tunnelall

  anyconnect ssl dtls enable
